← All projects

AI Health System

End-to-end AI system for automatic plant disease detection from leaf images using YOLOv8 and EfficientNet-B3 with Grad-CAM explainability.

  • FastAPI
  • YOLOv8
  • EfficientNet-B3
  • Grad-CAM
  • Python
  • PyTorch
Source on GitHub →

This project is an end-to-end artificial intelligence system capable of automatic disease analysis from plant images.

The pipeline begins with YOLOv8 detecting and cropping the leaf region within the image. The cropped region is then fed into an EfficientNet-B3 model for disease classification. Finally, Grad-CAM visualizes which regions the model focused on when making its decision, providing explainability.

On the backend, a FastAPI server loads these models into memory and exposes them through /detect_leaf, /classify_disease, and /explain_prediction endpoints. The frontend allows users to upload images and view results in real time.

The overarching goal is to enable early disease detection in agriculture, reduce yield loss, and provide a decision-support system. Future directions include strengthening the model with larger datasets, real-time analysis, mobile integration, and a scalable production-ready architecture.
